scripts.scoreboard: node --import tsx -e "import path from 'node:path'; import {loadConfig} from './src/config.js'; import {writeScoreboard} from './src/scoreboard.js'; import fs from 'node:fs/promises'; const ROOT=path.resolve(process.cwd()); const cfg=await loadConfig(ROOT); const files=await fs.readdir(path.join(ROOT,'reports')).catch(()=>[]); const days=files.filter(f=>/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\.md$/.test(f)).map(f=>f.replace(/\.md$/,'')).sort(); const out=await writeScoreboard(ROOT,cfg,days.slice(-14)); console.log(out);"
